modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error when uploading thank you letter in scholarship application.

full_description_text: The user was trying to upload their thank you letter. They encountered an error message saying "Account Creation Failure." This issue happened during the account creation process. It's causing a hold-up in their application.
short_description: Error when uploading thank you letter in scholarship application.
description: The user was trying to upload their thank you letter. They encountered an error message saying "Account Creation Failure." This issue happened during the account creation process. It's causing a hold-up in their application.
